artPrompt: A cheery goblin peddler shoving a battered pretzel cart through the feral square, holding aloft a slightly charred soft pretzel, smoke wisping from his singed wares; bonfire light glints flame-orange off the cart's dented metal, sparks and confetti drifting through ember-red haze and night-black smoke, his hopeful grin caught in a warm, wistful blur, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Snack Cart Goblin
flavorText: "Pretzels! Get yer pretzels! Slightly singed pretzels!"
